comments: Repeat of live sets originally broadcast 23 November 1984
Dumpy's Rusty Nuts, Twelfth Night, Waysted and Nazareth recorded live at the Kerrang! Wooargh! Weekender in Great Yarmouth held between 12-14 Oct 1984.

track_listing.track: Dumpy's Rusty Nuts - Live at the Kerrang! Wooargh! Weekender
Twelfth Night - Live at the Kerrang! Wooargh! Weekender
Waysted - Live at the Kerrang! Wooargh! Weekender
Nazareth - Live at the Kerrang! Wooargh! Weekender
